TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Dalia Grybauskaitńó = Mntucing hngkawas 1956 idas 3 jiyax 1 ka Dalia Grybauskaitńó ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Lithuania ta sayang o kiya ka Dalia Grybauskaitńó, pnaah hngkawas 2009 idas 7 jiyax 12 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Dalia Grybauskaitńó (Kari Lithuania: Dalia Grybauskaitńó, kngkawas 1956 idas 3 diyax 1-), mntuting Suryeyn cida Lithuania sotu Vilnius, kiya ka Lithuania seyji jnwu, hiya u mnngalan Lithuania Waycyawbu Huku Bucyo mi Caycngbu Bucyo, kiya u mniq kngkawas 2004 prading ngalan Omong Yingkay seykining keykaku mi yosang Caycng na Ying. Kngkawas 2009 idas 5 diyax 17 Soto seyngkyo cida u Dalia Grybauskaitńó ka wada mbiyax mangal Soto. Idas 7 diyax 12, Dalia Grybauskaitńó u wada mdhu bay psdhuwan phiyu Soto, wada mwaya bay rikisi Lithuania tu1 qridin Soto. NdananÁ∂ďś≠∑ Dalia Grybauskaitńó pa mntuting Lithuania sotu Vilnius, Dalia Grybauskaitńó u kngkawas 1983 mnhdu muyas Leningrader Pyasan Tubeyhing Zhdanov Keyjayswey cwanyey, bukuy daw qmpah mniq Lithuania Ksweyweyn. Kngkawas 1990 babaw dukuricu ka Lithuania daw, Dalia Grybauskaitńó pa ngalan seykining Lithuania Keyjay Sweyweyn Ksweybu. Dalia Grybauskaitńó u kngkawas 1991 cida musa Amirika Pyasan Tubeyhing George muyas pkrana knkla, tbrinah qnlhangan daw ngalan Kwoci Keyjay Hcwobu Ocos seykining niya. Kndusan quri seyjiśĒŅś≤ĽÁĒüś∂Į Kngkawas 1990 mlatac Suryeyn dukuricu ka Lithuania daw, kngkawas 1993 wada hdilan Waycyawbu Keyjay Hcwos Scang, kngkawas 1994 cida skulan ngalan Omong Kongs, kngkawas 1996 daw wada ngalan tnpusu Amirika Kongs. Kngkawas 1999, Dalia Grybauskaitńó u splawa tbrinah qnlhangan, mkala qpahun ngalan Keyjaybu Huku Bucyo, so kawas daw wada ngalan Waycyawbu Huku Bucyo, tumal Lithuania mtmay Omong na pprngawan kari. Omong cidaś≠źÁõüśôāśúü Dalia Grybauskaitńó kngkawas 2004 ngalan rmirih Lithuania na Omong cwanweyn, seykining Omong Caycng uuda yosang qpahang. SotoÁłĹÁĶĪ Kngkawas 2009 idas 5, Dalia Grybauskaitńó pa mniq Lithuania knbeyhing seyngkyo mangal 68.18% hyo, wada mndungus mbiyax mangal Soto. Kngkawas 2014 idas 5 mniq tumn2 kcka meytaq Soto seyngkyo mangal 57.87% mnangal hyo ryu mndungus lmutuc mangal Soto dungan. Kndusan niya nanaqÁßĀšļļÁĒüśīĽ Dalia Grybauskaitńó u ini sturung musa sediq mi uka laqi niya. Uxay wana kari tnpusu kari Lithuania, Dalia Grybauskaitńó pa mkla balay skari Ingkoku, kari Russia mi kari Poland, mkla skari France uri. Dalia Grybauskaitńó pa niqan Mqalux Habuk Kongsotaw uri. Papak
S.PHON: = dalia g…ĺjbauskait* = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * ka dalia g…ĺjbauskait* ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan litńßuania ta sajaŇč o kija ka dalia g…ĺjbauskait*, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. dalia g…ĺjbauskait* (ka…ĺi litńßuania: dalia g…ĺjbauskait*, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *-), mntutiŇč su…ĺj…ôn ¶ida litńßuania sotu *ilnius, kija ka litńßuania s…ô…üi …ünwu, ńßija u mnŇčalan litńßuania waj ¶jawbu ńßuku bu ¶jo mi ¶aj ¶Ňčbu bu ¶jo, kija u mniq kŇčkawas **** p…ĺadiŇč Ňčalan omoŇč jiŇčkaj s…ôkiniŇč k…ôkaku mi josaŇč ¶aj ¶Ňč na jiŇč. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** soto s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida u dalia g…ĺjbauskait* ka wada mbijax maŇčal soto. idas * dijax **, dalia g…ĺjbauskait* u wada mdńßu baj psdńßuwan pńßiju soto, wada mwaja baj …ĺikisi litńßuania tu* q…ĺidin soto. ndanan** dalia g…ĺjbauskait* pa mntutiŇč litńßuania sotu *ilnius, dalia g…ĺjbauskait* u kŇčkawas **** mnńßdu mujas l…ôniŇč…ĺad…ô…ĺ pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč *ńßdano* k…ô…üajsw…ô ¶wanj…ô, bukuj daw qmpańß mniq litńßuania ksw…ôw…ôn. kŇčkawas **** babaw duku…ĺi ¶u ka litńßuania daw, dalia g…ĺjbauskait* pa Ňčalan s…ôkiniŇč litńßuania k…ô…üaj sw…ôw…ôn ksw…ôbu. dalia g…ĺjbauskait* u kŇčkawas **** ¶ida musa ami…ĺika pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč g…ôo…ĺg…ô mujas pk…ĺana knkla, tb…ĺinańß qnlńßaŇčan daw Ňčalan kwo ¶i k…ô…üaj ńß ¶wobu o ¶os s…ôkiniŇč nija. kndusan qu…ĺi s…ô…üi**** kŇčkawas **** mlata ¶ su…ĺj…ôn duku…ĺi ¶u ka litńßuania daw, kŇčkawas **** wada ńßdilan waj ¶jawbu k…ô…üaj ńß ¶wos s ¶aŇč, kŇčkawas **** ¶ida skulan Ňčalan omoŇč koŇčs, kŇčkawas **** daw wada Ňčalan tnpusu ami…ĺika koŇčs. kŇčkawas ****, dalia g…ĺjbauskait* u splawa tb…ĺinańß qnlńßaŇčan, mkala qpańßun Ňčalan k…ô…üajbu ńßuku bu ¶jo, so kawas daw wada Ňčalan waj ¶jawbu ńßuku bu ¶jo, tumal litńßuania mtmaj omoŇč na pp…ĺŇčawan ka…ĺi. omoŇč ¶ida**** dalia g…ĺjbauskait* kŇčkawas **** Ňčalan …ĺmi…ĺińß litńßuania na omoŇč ¶wanw…ôn, s…ôkiniŇč omoŇč ¶aj ¶Ňč uuda josaŇč qpańßaŇč. soto** kŇčkawas **** idas *, dalia g…ĺjbauskait* pa mniq litńßuania knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo maŇčal **.**% ńßjo, wada mnduŇčus mbijax maŇčal soto. kŇčkawas **** idas * mniq tumn* k ¶ka m…ôtaq soto s…ôŇčkjo maŇčal **.**% mnaŇčal ńßjo …ĺju mnduŇčus lmutu ¶ maŇčal soto duŇčan. kndusan nija nanaq**** dalia g…ĺjbauskait* u ini stu…ĺuŇč musa s…ôdiq mi uka laqi nija. uxaj wana ka…ĺi tnpusu ka…ĺi litńßuania, dalia g…ĺjbauskait* pa mkla balaj ska…ĺi iŇčkoku, ka…ĺi …ĺussia mi ka…ĺi poland, mkla ska…ĺi *…ĺan ¶…ô u…ĺi. dalia g…ĺjbauskait* pa niqan mqalux ńßabuk koŇčsotaw u…ĺi. papak
S.FORM: = Dalia Grybauskaitńó = Mntucing hngkawas 1956 idas 3 jiyax 1 ka Dalia Grybauskaitńó ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Lithuania ta sayang o kiya ka Dalia Grybauskaitńó, pnaah hngkawas 2009 idas 7 jiyax 12 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Dalia Grybauskaitńó (Kari Lithuania: Dalia Grybauskaitńó, kngkawas 1956 idas 3 diyax 1-), mntuting Suryeyn cida Lithuania sotu Vilnius, kiya ka Lithuania seyji jnwu, hiya u mnngalan Lithuania Waycyawbu Huku Bucyo mi Caycngbu Bucyo, kiya u mniq kngkawas 2004 prading ngalan Omong Yingkay seykining keykaku mi yosang Caycng na Ying. Kngkawas 2009 idas 5 diyax 17 Soto seyngkyo cida u Dalia Grybauskaitńó ka wada mbiyax mangal Soto. Idas 7 diyax 12, Dalia Grybauskaitńó u wada mdhu bay psdhuwan phiyu Soto, wada mwaya bay rikisi Lithuania tu1 qridin Soto. Kngkawas 1990 babaw dukuricu ka Lithuania daw, Dalia Grybauskaitńó pa ngalan seykining Lithuania Keyjay Sweyweyn Ksweybu. Dalia Grybauskaitńó u kngkawas 1991 cida musa Amirika Pyasan Tubeyhing George muyas pkrana knkla, tbrinah qnlhangan daw ngalan Kwoci Keyjay Hcwobu Ocos seykining niya. Kngkawas 2014 idas 5 mniq tumn2 kcka meytaq Soto seyngkyo mangal 57.87% mnangal hyo ryu mndungus lmutuc mangal Soto dungan.
